creator: nox@jelal.kn-bremen.de
text:
Ok this is the patch I came up with, also at:

	http://people.freebsd.org/~nox/tmp/ports-150133.patch

- Update ftp/linux-f10-curl rpms to 7.19.6-2.fc10
- Update security/linux-f10-nss rpms to 3.12.3.99.3-2.10.6.fc10
- Update emulators/linux_base-f10 elfutils rpms to 0.142-1.fc10
- Small plist fix (empty dir) for security/linux-f10-cyrus-sasl2

retrieving revision 1.56
diff -u -p -r1.56 Makefile
--- emulators/linux_base-f10/Makefile	8 Sep 2009 09:16:27 -0000	1.56
+++ emulators/linux_base-f10/Makefile	4 Sep 2010 15:09:13 -0000
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=		f10
 PORTVERSION=		10
-PORTREVISION=		2
+PORTREVISION=		3
 CATEGORIES=		emulators linux
 MASTER_SITES=		${MASTER_SITE_FEDORA_LINUX}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	../updates/${PORTVERSION}/${LINUX_RPM_ARCH} \
@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@ BIN_DISTFILES=	basesystem-10.0-1.noarch.
 		db4-4.7.25-7.fc10.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm \
 		e2fsprogs-1.41.4-6.fc10.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm \
 		e2fsprogs-libs-1.41.4-6.fc10.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm \
-		elfutils-0.141-1.fc10.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm \
+		elfutils-0.142-1.fc10.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm \
 		fedora-release-10-1.noarch.rpm \
 		filesystem-2.4.19-1.fc10.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm \
 		freetype-2.3.7-3.fc10.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm \
@@ -76,7 +76,7 @@ SRC_DISTFILES+=	acl-2.2.47-3.fc10.src.rp
 		coreutils-6.12-17.fc10.src.rpm \
 		db4-4.7.25-5.fc10.src.rpm \
 		e2fsprogs-1.41.4-6.fc10.src.rpm \
-		elfutils-0.141-1.fc10.src.rpm \
+		elfutils-0.142-1.fc10.src.rpm \
 		fedora-release-10-1.src.rpm \
 		filesystem-2.4.19-1.fc10.src.rpm \
 		freetype-2.3.7-1.fc10.src.rpm \

===================================================================
RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/ftp/linux-f10-curl/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.12
diff -u -p -r1.12 Makefile
--- ftp/linux-f10-curl/Makefile	15 Nov 2009 20:21:38 -0000	1.12
+++ ftp/linux-f10-curl/Makefile	4 Sep 2010 15:52:32 -0000
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	curl
 PORTVERSION=	7.19.6
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	ftp linux
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	linux-f10-
 DISTFILES=	curl-${PORTVERSION}-${RPMVERSION}.i386.rpm \
@@ -25,7 +26,7 @@ CONFLICTS=	linux-curl-[0-9]* linux-f8-cu
 USE_LINUX_RPM=	yes
 USE_LINUX_APPS=	cyrus-sasl2 openldap
 LINUX_DIST_VER=	10
-RPMVERSION=	1.fc10
+RPMVERSION=	2.fc10
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 BRANDELF_FILES=	usr/bin/curl
 DESCR=	${.CURDIR}/../${PORTNAME}/pkg-descr
